content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all source changes: new planned_elsewhere.rs handler, model additions (PlannedElsewhereMapping struct, PlannedElsewhereMapped event type), service layer (record + load functions with PlannedElsewhereMappingPort), fs adapter (FsPlannedElsewhereMappingStore with NDJSON persistence and advisory locking), and br_process adapter (comment_bead method). All 6 new tests pass. The implementation is clean, follows existing codebase patterns (port-based DI at service layer, concrete types at runtime layer, advisory file locking, NDJSON append-only stores), and handles stale beads gracefully. No security issues — br comment uses process args, not shell. No correctness bugs found. Two minor robustness observations that don't rise to amendment level: (1) dual-write between mapping NDJSON and journal is non-atomic, but this matches existing patterns and both are append-only, (2) no deduplication guard prevents recording the same mapping twice, but the append-only design and batch caller make this unlikely in practice.

## Amendments

None.
